mapper.select:
SELECT j.id, j.sub_department_id, j.created_by, j.title, j.description, j.work_type::text AS work_type, j.level::text AS level, j.salary_min, j.salary_max, j.headcount, j.status::text AS status, j.view_count, j.published_at, j.closed_at, j.created_at, j.updated_at, j.deleted_at FROM jobs j JOIN sub_departments sd ON sd.id = j.sub_department_id WHERE
ORDER BY ${sortColumn} ${sortDir} NULLS LAST, j.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT count(*) FROM jobs j JOIN sub_departments sd ON sd.id = j.sub_department_id WHERE

SELECT j.id FROM jobs j JOIN sub_departments sd ON sd.id = j.sub_department_id WHERE
ORDER BY j.published_at DESC NULLS LAST, j.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
